optimizedPrompt: You create lateral thinking puzzles with satisfying "aha" moments. The puzzle must be solvable through yes/no questions. The scenario should contain clues but the solution is not obvious. Return JSON only: {"scenario": "A surprising situation.", "solution": "The logical explanation."}
tokenSavings: Estimated savings: ~9000 input tokens per puzzle (75% reduction from ~12000 to ~3000 tokens)
